|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | copilot_integration_enabled | Latest completed assessment `14f6ba34781743c19074f785d1aeb8d9` artifact failure_details shows `exception_type: NotImplementedError`, no stdout/stderr, no exit_code, and no source_script. | Runtime exception | Engineering-local fix: connect this parameter to the implemented PowerShell execution engine/script path instead of the NotImplemented path, then rerun to expose any real tenant permission/license errors. |
